hero.status: Based in Montreal · Available for new clients
hero.title: Custom Shopify development: themes built from Figma files, apps the Shopify  doesn't have, integrations that actually work.

about.body: I studied psychology at Cal State Long Beach before deciding I wanted to build things. Moved to Montreal, joined Le Wagon's bootcamp, and that's where coding clicked. After the bootcamp I joined Field Office, a Montreal web agency, where most of my work was Shopify: custom sections from Figma files, custom apps and webhooks when off-the-shelf solutions weren't enough. Now I'm independent, and I've broadened what I take on. Not everything needs a platform. I've built cinematic portfolio sites, commerce pages, and custom tools that replace platform subscriptions at a fraction of the cost. With the right AI tooling, I can scope and ship these faster than a traditional agency, and lean enough to stay within a real budget.

design.title: Design Implementation
design.body: You have the files. I build them exactly as designed in Shopify: custom Liquid sections, pixel-perfect to the mockup. No interpretation, no shortcuts.

features.title: Features & Integrations
features.body: Custom fulfillment apps, inventory sync, Klaviyo, Google Tag Manager, third-party APIs. When the Shopify  doesn't have what you need, I build it.

step1.label: You share what you need
step1.subLabel: Tell me what you're trying to build or fix. No brief template, no lengthy forms. Just tell me what's going on.

step2.label: I come back with a clear scope
step2.subLabel: I'll tell you exactly what I'll do, how long it'll take, and what it costs. No surprises.

step3.label: We work together ongoing
step3.subLabel: Most clients stay on a monthly retainer. Your store keeps evolving, I keep building.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.body: I prefer to work on a monthly retainer: predictable for you, sustainable for me.

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.body: If you have a Shopify store that needs custom development, or an agency looking for a reliable Shopify specialist, get in touch.
